hotspots.sentence: The school gate is made of iron. 学校大门是铁制的。
The clock tower stands at the school entrance. 钟楼矗立在校门口。
Students live in this dormitory. 学生们住在这栋宿舍楼里。
We play basketball on the playground. 我们在操场上打篮球。
Many boys are playing on the basketball court. 很多男生正在篮球场上打球。
There are several tennis courts beside the lake. 湖边有几片网球场。
The main building is in the center of the campus. 主楼位于校园中央。
The greenhouse grows all kinds of plants. 温室里培育着各种各样的植物。
Cherry blossoms bloom along the main road. 主干道两旁樱花盛开。
We can buy snacks in the shops at the school gate. 我们可以在校门口的商店购买零食。
Many students walk along the path. 许多学生沿着步道行走。
Green mountains are behind the campus. 校园后方是青翠的群山。
Green mountains are behind the campus. 校园后方是青翠的群山。
Trees make the campus beautiful. 树木让校园景色优美。

hotspots.cn: Cherry trees line the central avenue of the school.
hotspots.sentence: Cherry trees line the central avenue of the school. 学校中央大道两旁种满樱花树。
There is a wooden pavilion in the middle of the lake. 湖中央有一座木凉亭。
We enjoy reading in the waterside pavilion. 我们在湖边亭子里看书。
The concert will be held in the gymnasium. 这场音乐会将在体育馆举办。
Please keep off the lawn. 请勿践踏草坪。
Shrubs are planted beside the walking path. 步道两侧栽种着灌木丛。
This wide road is a pedestrian zone. 这条宽阔道路是步行区域。
Visitors should park their cars in the car park. 访客需要将车辆停放在停车场。
